description: Style noteThis john players shirt gets a sartorial stamp of approval, with it's refined collar, silhouetted tailoring and it's fine, luxe fabric. Make the right impression with this shirt - be it on lazy weekends or during after-hours dinner. The best bet for semi-formal Fridays, wear this with fitted denims and ankle boots!Product DetailsWhite shirt with a spread collar, a patch pocket on the left chest, half sleeves, a buttoned placket and a curved hemMaterial and CareCotton linen fabricDry clean or machine wash with like colours onlyUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededLine dry inside-out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitJohn Players' Regular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
